assertions.description: INCORRECT: U1 is a 74HC00 NAND gate with 4 gate units plus a power unit (5 units total). The subcircuits list contains 5 separate entries all with center_ic=U1, each with an identical neighbor list. The subcircuit builder processes each schematic symbol instance rather than deduplicating by reference. This same bug is confirmed in VGAtest where U5 (74HC02, 5 units) produces 5 subcircuit entries.
